MODULE: cosmos.integration.bankr.client
FILE: cosmos/integration/bankr/client.py (266 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Bankr API Client.

Async client for the Bankr Agent API with job polling pattern.

CLASSES:
- BankrError(Exception): Base exception for Bankr API errors.
- BankrAuthError(BankrError): Authentication error.
- BankrRateLimitError(BankrError): Rate limit exceeded.
- BankrJobError(BankrError): Job execution error.
- JobResult: Result from a completed Bankr job.
  Methods: def from_response(cls, data: Dict) -> 'JobResult'
- BankrClient: Async client for Bankr Agent API.

Uses the job-based async pattern:
1. Submit p
  Methods: async def close(self)
  Methods: async def submit_prompt(self, prompt: str) -> str
  Methods: async def get_job_status(self, job_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def poll_job(self, job_id: str, timeout: float=None) -> JobResult
  Methods: async def cancel_job(self, job_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def execute(self, prompt: str, timeout: float=None) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def execute_trade(self, prompt: str) -> JobResult
  Methods: async def get_price(self, token: str) -> float
